name: top bunk
hints: The top bunk has important items - a face mask and a diamond watch treasure.
GET MASK and GET WATCH. The face mask is essential for underwater exploration. The diamond watch is a treasure.
GET MASK (needed for diving/underwater areas) and GET WATCH (treasure - store in room 13). FEEL confirms there's no mattress here. DOWN returns to the cabin.
The face mask is critical for exploring underwater areas. The *Diamond watch* is one of 13 treasures. DOWN returns to the cabin (room 2).
notes: Top bunk accessed via GO LADDER or GO TOP from the cabin (room 2). Contains the face mask (essential for underwater exploration) and *Diamond watch* treasure. FEEL reveals no mattress (unlike bottom bunk). DOWN returns to cabin (room 2).
